message:
fix: resolve issues #7429-#7434 (WebSocket deadlines, cancel deadlock, storage loop, slow clients) (#7436)

- #7429: Add SetWriteDeadline to all WebSocket WriteJSON calls in
  server_ai.go so hung clients cannot block indefinitely
- #7430: Set suppressNextSaveRef before clearing missions on remote
  storage wipe to prevent cross-tab write-back loop
- #7432: Move cancelFn() outside activeChatCtxsMu lock in both
  handleCancelChat and handleCancelChatHTTP to prevent deadlock
- #7434: Disconnect slow clients whose send buffers are full instead
  of silently dropping broadcast messages

Closes #7429, closes #7430, closes #7432, closes #7434

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
